title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama repository: a lightweight, extensible framework for running LLMs locally with a built-in model library and simple REST API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, pull, and manage models from Node or the browser.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and push models with a simple Pythonic API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama; use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI); chat, multi-model, RAG, code highlighting, and admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; generate, chat, pull models, and stream responses in JVM applications.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate for Ollama; strongly-typed async client for chatting, generating, and pulling models.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-style code-completion backend for VS Code.

title: ollama-cli
summary: A community-enhanced interactive CLI for Ollama with history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images (CPU & GPU) for Ollama; one-liner to run Llama 3, Mistral, etc. in a container.

title: ollama-nvidia-docker
summary: Ready-to-use Nvidia GPU Dockerfile and compose for Ollama with automatic driver/runtime detection.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + LangChain + Chroma; ingest PDFs and chat with local embeddings.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama responses into any channel; supports slash commands and custom models.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that lets teams chat with any Ollama model via threaded messages and app mentions.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that brings local LLM completion & summarization via Ollama into your notes.

title: ollama-vscode
summary: VS Code extension for chatting with Ollama models inside the editor sidebar with code-block rendering.

title: ollama-chroma
summary: Lightweight wrapper to generate embeddings with Ollama and store/query them in Chroma vector DB.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as Generators or Embedders in Haystack 2.0 pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes for Ollama: RAG, function-calling, fine-tune, multi-modal, and deployment examples.
